title: ヒシアマ姐さん奮闘記　～追い込み編～

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm out on a walk by myself, I find
Hishi Amazon mulling over something.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you. Listen, I want your advice on
something. I've been having trouble nailing my
sprint in the final stretch lately.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I want to just blow past the pack, but I keep
finding my way forward blocked off.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Whaddya think I should do when that happens?
choice_data_list:
Blow the other racers away with sheer force of
will.
Go wide on the outside, then make your move.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So you're saying I gotta beat the others not just in
speed, but in spirit too, huh? Yeah, that makes
sense.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I hate to admit it, but with the kind of results I've
been getting lately, my confidence might've
taken a hit.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right! Time to get more pumped than ever and
get racin'!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: From the outside? Yeah, that could work!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to cover more ground doing it that way,
but that shouldn't be an issue if I just run faster!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right, I gotta buff up this body so that I win
even from the outer track!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
First thing on my list is reassessing my basic
training! Your daily efforts are what pays off when
it matters, after all!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the advice and getting me outta that
rut! My next race'll be my best yet! I can feel it!
